records.stderr_pattern: errors parsing go\.mod|go\.mod:.*unknown directive|usage: require module
records.description: go.mod has syntax errors — likely needs regeneration via go mod init/tidy

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "go: errors parsing go.mod:" >&2; echo "go.mod:3: unknown directive: requir" >&2; exit 1'

records.stderr_pattern: GOPATH entry is relative|must be absolute path
records.description: GOPATH set to relative path — override with absolute path

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "go: GOPATH entry is relative; must be absolute path: \"gopath\"." >&2; exit 1'
